---
name: Incorrect reading
about: When kazoekata.jp displays an incorrect reading for a counter
title: "[READING]"
labels: 'bug, wrong-reading'
assignees: ''

---

> [!NOTE]
> This issue tracker is for **data errors** (e.g., wrong counters, incorrect readings) only.
> For UI bugs or other application-related issues, please email **kazoekata.maintainers(at)kingi89.fi**.

## Use this template when for example ##

* a specific/irregular reading is expected, but not present (e.g. "hatachi", and not "nijussai", for "20歳")
* a traditional Japanese number reading should be used (e.g. "hitotsubu", and not "ichitsubu", for "1粒")
* Sino-Japanese number reading should be used (e.g. "ippiki", and not "hitohiki", for "1匹")
* Rendaku is not applied when it should, or is misapplied (e.g. "sanbon", and not "sanhon", for "3本")
* Sokuon is not applied when it should, or is misapplied (e.g. "rokusatsu" and not "rossatsu" for "6冊")

## Mistake details

* **Counter identifier (see the "Is this incorrect?" dialog):** 
* **Database version (see the "About" dialog):** (e.g., 2.018)
* **Counter:** (e.g., 本)
* **Value:** (e.g., 3)
* **Incorrect reading:** (e.g., sanhon)
* **Correct reading:** (e.g., sanbon)
